name: giro
title: Giro
description: Track time on Jira stories via Tempo and create stories from templates
author: cj69vddqxq

commands.name: track
commands.title: Giro
commands.subtitle: Track time on Jira and Tempo
commands.description: View current sprint stories, track time, and create new stories from templates

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Toggle Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Show active timer in menu bar
commands.description: Shows the active timer story in the macOS menu bar

preferences.name: jiraAccountId
preferences.title: Jira Account ID
preferences.description: Your Jira account ID (found in your Jira profile URL)

preferences.name: jiraBoardId
preferences.title: Jira Board ID
preferences.description: The Scrum/Kanban board ID for your project

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
